name: consensus-engine
default_program: [stages: preflight>detect>analyze>review>handoff>audit | scope: repo|diff|paths(glob,...) | policy: evidence,safety-gates,deterministic-output | lens: kahneman-tversky | output: md(contract=v1)]

required_inputs.name: MISSION_TASK
required_inputs.description: One bounded decision or analysis question.

required_inputs.name: CONSTRAINTS
required_inputs.description: Hard limits, non-goals, or compatibility boundaries.

required_inputs.name: DONE_SIGNALS
required_inputs.description: What a valid final recommendation must contain.

required_inputs.name: CONTEXT_FILES
required_inputs.description: Local files to embed as bounded evidence.

required_inputs.name: LOCAL_EVIDENCE
required_inputs.description: Already verified facts that should anchor the run.

required_inputs.name: MACRO_EXPRESSION
required_inputs.description: Optional explicit compose macro that defines the shared execution contract.
